message:
fix: carousel wrap-around, mobile tier scoring, stats prefix parsing, and misc cleanup

Endorsement carousel (endorsement-showcase):
- Convert linear carousel navigation to wrap-around (loops back to start
  from end and vice versa) for better UX with small item counts
- Move keyboard event listener to window instead of container element so
  arrow key navigation works regardless of focus state
- Consolidate duplicate inline navigation handlers into goToPrev/goToNext
  callbacks
- Guard keyboard handler with early return when layout is irrelevant

Demo card (demo-card):
- Cache getBoundingClientRect on mouseEnter (same layout thrashing fix
  applied to other card components)

GitHub heartbeat streak calculation (github-heartbeat):
- Fix streak counter to check yesterday when today has no activity yet,
  avoiding premature streak reset mid-day

Stats grid prefix support (stats-grid):
- Extend parseStatValue to handle leading non-numeric prefixes (e.g. "$"
  in "$600B") via updated regex capture group
- Pass prefix to AnimatedNumber component for correct rendering

Mobile optimization scoring (use-mobile-optimizations):
- Detect high-end mobile devices (6+ cores, no low-memory flag) and
  exempt them from the blanket mobile penalty
- Increase weight for prefersReducedMotion (2 -> 4) and no WebGL2
  (1 -> 2) since these are stronger quality signals
- Add else-if for core count scoring to avoid double-penalty

Color lookup caching (colors):
- Add Map cache for partial match results to avoid repeated O(n)
  Object.keys scans on the gradient dictionary

Media page (media/page):
- Remove unnecessary "use client" directive (component has no client-
  side hooks or state)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
